title: Verify trial corner widget displays on homepage for Day 0-1 trial users
description: Test that the persistent trial corner widget with shield/clock icon appears on homepage for users with active trial on Day 0 and Day 1
preconditions: User has activated a trial within last 24 hours
User is on Day 0 or Day 1 of trial

steps.description: 1. Login as a user with active trial on Day 0 or Day 1
3. Observe the trial corner widget in the header area

expected_result: Trial corner widget is visible with shield/clock icon and displays 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining' with link to Manage Control Center
